channel.title: Developers on LiaScript
channel.description: Recent content in Developers on LiaScript

item.title: Comunica for LiaScript: Run SPARQL Queries and Explore Knowledge Graphs
item.description: The Semantic Web and Linked Open Data are among the richest topics in computer science and information science — but teaching SPARQL interactively has always required running a server.

item.title: LiveEdit-Embeddings for LiaScript: Inline Interactive LiaScript Examples
item.description: When teaching LiaScript itself — or when building meta-courses that demonstrate LiaScript features — you need a way to show live, editable LiaScript code inline. The LiveEdit-Embeddings template does exactly this: it encodes a LiaScript markdown snippet as a base64 URL and embeds the LiaScript LiveEditor as an inline iframe.

item.title: PouchDB for LiaScript: NoSQL Documents and Mango Queries in the Browser
item.description: Relational databases are one way to store data. Documents are another. The PouchDB template brings PouchDB — a JavaScript database inspired by Apache CouchDB — directly into your LiaScript courses.

item.title: Redis for LiaScript: Explore Key-Value Stores and Data Structures in the Browser
item.description: Redis is one of the most widely used databases in the world — but teaching it interactively has always meant running a Redis server. The Redis template removes that requirement entirely.

item.title: WebSerial for LiaScript: Connect Your Code Editor to Real Hardware
item.description: Bridging the gap between learning materials and real hardware is one of the hardest challenges in TVET and embedded systems education. The WebSerial template connects the LiaScript code editor directly to a microcontroller via Chrome’s Web Serial API.
